name: Autobots
description: The Autobots are the heroic faction of Transformers, known for their commitment to protecting humanity and fighting against the Decepticons. They value freedom, justice, and compassion, often putting the needs of others before their own. Led by Optimus Prime, the Autobots are dedicated to defending Earth and its inhabitants from the threats posed by the Decepticons.

name: Decepticons
description: The Decepticons are the villainous faction of Transformers, driven by a desire for power and domination. They are often ruthless and aggressive, seeking to conquer Earth and subjugate humanity. Led by Megatron, the Decepticons are known for their cunning and willingness to use any means necessary to achieve their goals, including deception, manipulation, and brute force.

name: Unaligned
description: The Unaligned faction consists of Transformers who do not align themselves with either the Autobots or Decepticons. These individuals may have their own motivations, goals, or beliefs that prevent them from joining either side. They can be mercenaries, independent operators, or simply those who choose to remain neutral in the ongoing conflict between the Autobots and Decepticons.
